Ouija (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,856,010Details
International Box Office $52,444,622
Worldwide Box Office $103,300,632
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,211,359
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,891,705
Total $8,103,064
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A group of friends must confront their most terrifying fears when they awaken the dark powers of an ancient spirit board.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,875,995 (39.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.56 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,000,000 (worldwide box office is 20.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,858 opening theaters/2,899 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $74,447,723

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 24th, 2014 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: December 5th, 2014 (Wide) (Spain)
January 8th, 2015 (Wide) (Mexico)
January 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Italy)
January 22nd, 2015 (Wide) (Germany)
January 22nd, 2015 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: February 3rd, 2015 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for disturbing violent content, frightening horror images, and thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2333, 7/30/2014)
Running Time: 89 minutes
Franchise: Ouija
Plot point: Haunting
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Platinum Dunes, Blumhouse, Hasbro Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
